parameters.query:
DO $$
DECLARE
    tbl text;
BEGIN
    FOR tbl IN
        SELECT tablename
        FROM pg_tables
        WHERE schemaname = 'public'
          AND tablename LIKE 'uex_%_raw'
    LOOP
        EXECUTE format($cmd$
            DELETE FROM %I
            WHERE ingest_batch_id NOT IN (
                SELECT id
                FROM (
                    SELECT
                        b.id,
                        b.source_endpoint,
                        b.fetched_at,
                        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                            PARTITION BY b.source_endpoint
                            ORDER BY b.fetched_at DESC
                        ) AS rn
                    FROM ingest_batches b
                    WHERE b.source = 'uex'
                ) t
                WHERE t.rn <= 3  -- keep last 3 batches per endpoint
            )
        $cmd$, tbl);
    END LOOP;
END $$;

-- 1) Create a temp table to hold the results for this session
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_uex_raw_cleanup_report;

CREATE TEMP TABLE tmp_uex_raw_cleanup_report (
    tablename      text,
    rows_to_delete bigint
);

-- 2) Fill it using dynamic SQL in a DO block
DO $$
DECLARE
    tbl text;
    cnt bigint;
BEGIN
    FOR tbl IN
        SELECT tablename
        FROM pg_tables
        WHERE schemaname = 'public'
          AND tablename LIKE 'uex_%_raw'
        ORDER BY tablename
    LOOP
        EXECUTE format($sql$
            SELECT COUNT(*)
            FROM %I
            WHERE ingest_batch_id NOT IN (
                SELECT id
                FROM (
                    SELECT
                        b.id,
                        b.source_endpoint,
                        b.fetched_at,
                        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                            PARTITION BY b.source_endpoint
                            ORDER BY b.fetched_at DESC
                        ) AS rn
                    FROM ingest_batches b
                    WHERE b.source = 'uex'
                ) t
                WHERE t.rn <= 3  -- keep last 3 batches per endpoint
            )
        $sql$, tbl)
        INTO cnt;

        INSERT INTO tmp_uex_raw_cleanup_report (tablename, rows_to_delete)
        VALUES (tbl, cnt);
    END LOOP;
END $$;

-- 3) Read the report
SELECT *
FROM tmp_uex_raw_cleanup_report
WHERE rows_to_delete > 0
ORDER BY tablename;
